# Maksym Voitko — mxvtk.dev

> Technology leader and staff-level engineer with 10+ years building data platforms and AI systems.

## About

Maksym Voitko is a technology leader joining Monday.com as R&D Tech Lead (April 2026). Previously Head of Data & AI at Honeycomb Software, leading ML, software and DevOps engineers building end-to-end data products, vectorisation pipelines and multi-agent RAG systems.

Career path: QA → Test Automation → Data Engineering (glomex) → Computer Vision/AI (SoftConstruct AJNA) → ML Team Lead (GR8 Tech) → Head of Data & AI (Honeycomb) → Monday.com.

Education: Master's in Computer Engineering (KPI, 2018), Master's in Civil Engineering (Kyiv, 2013).

## Skills

Python, Go, Bash, FastAPI, Flask, AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Helm, Terraform, Docker, Kafka, Airflow, Kubeflow, MLFlow, PyTorch, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Redis, Elasticsearch.
